name: madahorizon
description: MadaHorizon - Plateforme de tourisme à Madagascar

scripts.start: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install

author: MadaHorizon Team
